inspect.body: Un bloqueador de anuncios tiene que leer la página para quitar los anuncios: por eso pide permiso para acceder a los datos de los sitios. Pero la lectura ocurre solo en tu dispositivo. Nada sale del navegador. No tienes que creernos: el código del núcleo (bloqueo de red, filtros cosméticos, content script) es legible, no ofuscado. Puedes descomprimir el paquete y verificarlo tú mismo.
inspect.label: Transparencia, no promesas
inspect.note: La validación de las licencias Pro ocurre en un servidor separado y privado: la protección del producto es la licencia source-available (puedes leerla y usarla; no revenderla como producto competidor) + el servidor, no la ofuscación del código.
inspect.title: El código del núcleo es inspeccionable

install.safari.note.desc: Safari is stricter than other browsers. It requires Xcode (Apple's free app) to install extensions. The procedure takes about 30 minutes the first time. Requires macOS Ventura 13+, Safari 16.4+. Don't worry if you've never opened Terminal, I'll guide you step by step.
install.safari.note.title: Before you start
install.safari.permanent.desc: Unsigned extensions disable when Safari restarts. To use AdOff permanently without repeating step 5 every time, you have two options: (1) Join Apple Developer Program ($99/year) and sign the extension yourself, or (2) Wait for Mac App Store release. Coming soon, one-click installation.
install.safari.permanent.title: Make the installation permanent
install.safari.s1.desc:
1.1 Open Finder (smiley icon in the Dock at the bottom).
1.2 In the left sidebar, click Downloads.
1.3 Find the file adoff-safari.zip (the one you just downloaded).
1.4 Double-click the file. macOS extracts it automatically and creates an adoff-safari folder next to the ZIP.
1.5 Don't move or rename this folder. Leave it in Downloads.
install.safari.s1.title: Extract the ZIP file
install.safari.s2.desc:
2.1 Open Mac App Store (blue "A" icon in the Dock or Launchpad).
2.2 In the search bar at top left, type Xcode and press Return.
2.3 Click Download or Install on the Xcode entry (Apple icon, by Apple).
2.4 Sign in with your Apple ID if requested (same as App Store).
2.5 Wait for download. Xcode is large (~10 GB), might take 20-60 minutes.
2.6 When ready, open Xcode at least once: click the icon in Launchpad or Applications.
2.7 A window appears with license terms. Click Agree.
2.8 Wait for Xcode to finish initial setup (1-2 minutes), then close it (Cmd+Q).
💡 If your Mac doesn't have enough space, free at least 15 GB before starting.
install.safari.s2.tip: If your Mac doesn't have enough space, free at least 15 GB before starting.
install.safari.s2.title: Install Xcode (free, ~10 GB)
install.safari.s3.desc:
3.1 Press Cmd + Space together. A search bar opens (Spotlight) at top.
3.2 Type Terminal and press Return. A white/black window opens (Terminal, nothing scary, it's a normal Mac program).
3.3 Copy this command exactly (click the gray box to select, then Cmd+C):
xcrun safari-web-extension-converter ~/Downloads/adoff-safari
3.4 Click in the Terminal window, paste with Cmd+V, then press Return.
3.5 Terminal asks "Continue?". Type y and press Return.
3.6 Wait 30-60 seconds. Xcode opens automatically with an "AdOff" project.
3.7 In Xcode, click the ▶ Play button at top left (or Cmd+R).
3.8 Compilation: wait 1-3 minutes. A small "AdOff" window might open. You can close it (extension is already installed).
⚠ If you get "permission denied" or "command not found": open Xcode, Preferences, Locations, Command Line Tools, and select the newest version. Then retry step 3.4.
install.safari.s3.title: Open Terminal and run command
install.safari.s3.warn: If you get "permission denied" or "command not found": open Xcode, Preferences, Locations, Command Line Tools, and select the newest version. Then retry step 3.4.
install.safari.s4.desc:
4.1 Open Safari (compass icon in the Dock).
4.2 In the menu bar at top, click Safari → Preferences (or Cmd+,).
4.3 A window opens with tabs at top. Click Advanced (last one, gear icon).
4.4 At the bottom, find Show web developer features (or "Show Developer menu" on older versions).
4.5 Check the box. A new Developer menu appears in Safari's menu bar.
4.6 Close Preferences.
install.safari.s4.title: Enable Developer menu in Safari
install.safari.s5.desc:
5.1 In Safari's menu bar, click the new Developer menu.
5.2 Scroll the menu and click Allow Unsigned Extensions.
5.3 Safari asks for your Mac password (the one you use to log in). Type it and press Return.
5.4 The option is now active (you can verify: reopen Developer menu, "Allow Unsigned Extensions" has a checkmark).
⚠ Important: this option disables automatically every time you restart Safari. You must re-enable it (step 5.1-5.3) every system restart.
install.safari.s5.title: Allow unsigned extensions
install.safari.s5.warn: Important: this option disables automatically every time you restart Safari. You must re-enable it (step 5.1-5.3) every system restart.
install.safari.s6.desc:
6.1 Reopen Safari Preferences: Safari → Preferences (or Cmd+,).
6.2 Click the Extensions tab (puzzle icon).
6.3 In the left list, you should see AdOff. Check the box next to it.
6.4 A popup asks for site access permissions. Click Allow always on all websites (or "Allow on all websites").
6.5 Close Preferences. Visit any site with ads (news, video platform, forum). Ads are blocked.
6.6 The AdOff icon (an "A" with red overlay) appears automatically in Safari's toolbar at top right. Click it to open the popup with controls.
✅ Done. AdOff is active. You get 15 free Pro trial days. The icon shows the countdown.
install.safari.s6.success: Done. AdOff is active. You get 15 free Pro trial days. The icon shows the countdown.

premium.faq.browser.a: No. Browser-based VPN extensions have fundamental limitations: they can only route traffic from that specific browser tab, not from other apps or system services on your device. AdOff Premium uses dedicated mobile and desktop apps that tunnel all your device traffic — every app, every browser, every service. This is how real VPNs work.
premium.faq.browser.q: Is the VPN inside the browser?
premium.faq.devices.a: Up to 3 personal devices per Premium subscription. The VPN apps are available for Android (at launch) and desktop platforms (post-launch). The browser extension covers all your browsers regardless.
premium.faq.devices.q: How many devices can I use?
premium.faq.ends.a: When your Premium subscription ends or is cancelled, your VPN account is disabled immediately. The AdBlock Pro features you had active (trial or Pro) continue independently. Refunds are handled pro-rata for unused days — contact support.
premium.faq.ends.q: What happens when my subscription ends?
premium.faq.founder.a: The first 100 Premium subscribers at the Founder price (€29.99 for the first year, then €49.99/year) get a dedicated Founder Premium badge and the locked-in first-year rate. This is a separate pool from the AdBlock Founder seats — you can be a Premium Founder even if you're not an AdBlock Founder.
premium.faq.founder.q: What is the Founder Premium pool?
premium.faq.label: FAQ
premium.faq.logs.a: We log only: (1) whether your VPN account is active, and (2) the last timestamp you connected to the VPN (for the 7-day auto-disable feature). We do not log browsing history, visited sites, downloads, source/destination IPs, bandwidth, or any traffic data. Read the full VPN Policy for details.
premium.faq.logs.q: What does the VPN log, exactly?
premium.faq.p2p.a: Yes. P2P and BitTorrent traffic are allowed on AdOff Premium VPN, including on dedicated P2P-optimized servers. All usage must be for lawful purposes. See the VPN Policy for the full terms.
premium.faq.title: Questions about Premium
premium.faq.trial.a: The trial gives you the full AdBlock Pro experience: all ad blocking, video ad neutralization, and Stealth anti-detection. The VPN activates when you subscribe to Premium. This keeps the trial simple and the VPN cost-free until you decide.
premium.faq.trial.q: Does the 15-day free trial include the VPN?
premium.faq.upgrade.a: Yes. You can upgrade from Pro to Premium at any time. Your unused Pro days are credited pro-rata and applied to the Premium subscription cost. Contact support to upgrade, or use the upgrade option in your account dashboard.
premium.faq.upgrade.q: Can I upgrade from Pro to Premium?

>A private ad blocker that collects nothing
>AdOff blocks ads and trackers with a strict zero-log policy. Free, privacy-first.
private_ad_blocker.because.its.privacy.f: >Because it's privacy-first by design rather than by promise, it's GDPR-compliant from the ground up, and the code can be inspected before installation.

sl.solution.text1: AdOff es una extensión moderna para Chrome que bloquea publicidad, pop-ups, rastreadores y banners de cookies antes de que se carguen. Funciona de forma asíncrona: cero bloqueo de la página, cero ralentizaciones. La tecnología Stealth oculta cada huella, para que los sistemas anti-adblock no la detecten.
sl.solution.text2: 138 reglas de bloqueo de red. Filtros CSS cosméticos. Neutralización de la publicidad de vídeo en la fuente (Pro) en cualquier plataforma de streaming. Y una Zero Log Policy: ningún dato sobre tu navegación abandona el dispositivo. Ultraligera. Asíncrona. Privacy-first por diseño.
sl.solution.title: Un filtro invisible que trabaja en segundo plano. Mientras navegas.
sl.stealth.callout: El resultado: ningún sitio le muestra más el mensaje "desactiva su bloqueador de anuncios". Ni siquiera los medios periodísticos con los sistemas anti-adblock más agresivos del mercado.
sl.stealth.how1.desc: Simula las variables de anuncios estándar. El sitio "ve" los anuncios como cargados, aunque no lo estén.

sl.stealth.how2.desc: Intercepta las peticiones fetch/XHR a los servidores de detección. Responde con datos falsos convincentes.

sl.stealth.how3.desc: Los elementos cebo usados para detectar bloqueadores de anuncios se reconocen y se falsean.
sl.stealth.how3.title: Bait Spoofing
sl.stealth.how4.desc: Opera en el contexto privilegiado de la página. Indetectable por el aislamiento estándar de extensiones.
sl.stealth.how4.title: MAIN World Execution
sl.stealth.how5.desc: Sustituye el SDK de anuncios de vídeo por un stub neutro. El reproductor recibe "no hay anuncios disponibles".
sl.stealth.how5.title: IMA SDK Neutralization
sl.stealth.how6.desc: Enmascara los rastros de la extensión en el DOM y las API del navegador. Cero firmas detectables.
sl.stealth.how6.title: Anti-Fingerprinting
sl.stealth.label: Stealth Mode
sl.stealth.sub: Los sitios más agresivos usan seis técnicas diferentes para identificar un ad blocker: variables JavaScript, fetch hacia servidores publicitarios, elementos cebo en el DOM, mutation observer, interceptación XHR, fingerprinting. Stealth Mode los engaña todos.

sl.test1.name: Marco R.
sl.test1.quote: Después de instalarlo, el mensaje de "desactiva tu bloqueador de anuncios" desapareció. En todos los sitios. Incluso en webs de noticias con el anti-adblock más agresivo. Y el navegador va más ágil. Estoy alucinado.
sl.test2.name: Sara M.
sl.test2.quote: Trabajo en línea ocho horas al día. El tiempo que ahorro al no ver anuncios de vídeo es medible: unos 90 minutos a la semana, que ahora dedico a mi trabajo. El plan anual se pagó solo en dos días.
sl.test3.name: Luca T.
sl.test3.quote: He probado todos los bloqueadores famosos. Todos detectados por las webs de noticias que leo cada día. Con AdOff, silencio: ni pop-ups ni avisos. Mi hijo de quince años lo instaló y ahora se lo recomienda a sus amigos.
sl.test4.name: Elena V.
sl.test4.quote: Soy periodista y paso horas en webs de noticias. Antes era una guerra: banners por todas partes, muros de pago, avisos de "desactiva tu bloqueador" en cada artículo. Con el Modo Stealth todo desapareció. Leo en paz, como hace quince años.
sl.test5.name: Thomas K.
sl.test5.quote: Comprobé el tamaño de la extensión dos veces porque no me lo creía. Mi antiguo bloqueador pesaba seis megabytes y Chrome se volvía una tortuga. Con AdOff no noto diferencia: solo que los anuncios ya no están.
sl.test6.name: Andrea P.
sl.test6.quote: Llevo un pequeño e-commerce e investigo a la competencia todo el día. Antes pasaba la mitad del tiempo cerrando pop-ups y banners de cookies. Con AdOff desaparecen al cargar. El plan Lifetime fue la mejor inversión del año.

undetectable_ad_blocker.anti.adblock.sys: Anti-adblock systems plant decoy ad elements and check whether they get hidden, fire test requests to ad servers and check whether they're blocked, and probe for ad-related JavaScript globals. A normal blocker reacts to all of these in a way the page
undetectable_ad_blocker.being.undetectab: Being undetectable means passing those probes as if no blocker were present: the decoy element looks visible, the test requests look answered, the expected globals exist. AdOff operates in the page's main execution context and spoofs the bait element

undetectable_ad_blocker.once.detected.th: >Once detected, the site can hide its content behind a wall, show a nag, or quietly degrade your experience. You blocked the ads, but the site knows — and fights back.
undetectable_ad_blocker.the.result.ads.a: >The result: ads are removed at the network and cosmetic level, but the probes come back normal. No wall, no nag.
undetectable_ad_blocker.use.a.blocker.wi: >Use a blocker with a dedicated stealth layer that runs in the page context and masks bait elements, test requests, and detection variables. AdOff includes this in its Pro and trial tiers.
undetectable_ad_blocker.usually.yes.most: >Usually yes. Most blockers leave measurable traces. A stealth ad blocker like AdOff spoofs those signals so detection scripts see nothing unusual.

usp_section.adoff_non_traccia_navigazion: AdOff non traccia navigazione, non vende dati, non invia a server remoti (tranne una chiamata opzionale di validazione licenza). Conforme GDPR per design.
usp_section.costruita_nativamente_per_ma: Costruita nativamente per Manifest V3 senza bloat legacy. Zero tempo di caricamento percettibile, zero dipendenze runtime.
usp_section.interfaccia_e_documentazione: Interfaccia e documentazione in 15 lingue con rilevamento automatico lingua del browser. Costruito con priorità per l'Europa.
usp_section.la_maggior_parte_dei_blocker: La maggior parte dei blocker viene catturata da sistemi anti-adblock. AdOff gira nel MAIN world del browser, mascherando l'ambiente così che gli script di rilevamento non vedono nulla di strano.
usp_section.salta_automaticamente_gli_an: Salta automáticamente los anuncios de vídeo en cuanto el botón de saltar está disponible. No se requiere intervención a nivel de red en las plataformas de streaming.
usp_section.versione_gratuita_realmente_: Versión gratuita realmente útil, planes Pro de pago desde 2,99 EUR/mes. Sin programa de "anuncios aceptables", sin resultados patrocinados. Los ingresos provienen únicamente de los usuarios.
